notes: Config-only. L'état runtime (last_run, URLs soumises) vit dans state.json — gitignored, non synchronisé entre MBP et Mac mini. Pour voir l'état réel : SSH Mac mini ('cat ~/projects/eunomia/.claude/gsc-tracking/state.json'). Motifs traités par la skill gsc-indexation-quotidienne : 'URL is unknown to Google', 'Discovered - currently not indexed', 'Crawled - currently not indexed', 'Detected - currently not indexed'. À SKIP : 'Page with redirect', 'Excluded by noindex tag', 'Soft 404', 'Not found (404)', 'Duplicate without user-selected canonical'.
